key.name: host
key.description: Hostname or IP address of the last VNC server.

key.name: port
key.description: TCP port of the last VNC server.

key.name: username
key.description: Username used by authentication methods that require it.

key.name: preferred-encoding
key.description: Encoding requested first. Supported: zrle, hextile, raw, copyrect, trle, rre, tight, openh264.

key.name: view-only
key.description: Do not send mouse or keyboard events to the server.

key.name: scale-to-fit
key.description: Scale the remote desktop to fit the window.
